summary: Completed testing of P1 Core Admin Systems: Contest Management UI, Payment Management UI, User Management UI, Category Management UI, and Contest Entry Fee Payment Flow. All 20 backend API tests passed. Fixed 2 bugs in entry fee payment endpoints (KeyError for user_id). Frontend UI tests passed for Admin Panel (Dashboard, Contests, Payments, Contestants sections) and Contestant Dashboard (Entry Fee Payment banner with $50 fee and Pay button).
action_items: Stripe API key (sk_test_emergent) is a placeholder - needs real Stripe test key for actual payment processing
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /api/payments/my-status endpoint was using current_user['id'] instead of current_user['user_id'] - caused 500 error
Fixed: /api/payments/entry-fee endpoint had same issue with user_id access
seed_data_creation: Created test contests and categories via API tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Core Admin Systems fully tested. Contest Management, Payment Management, User Management, Category Management all working. Entry Fee Payment flow works but Stripe checkout requires real API key. Admin Panel navigation: /backbon/admin-login -> Portal Home -> 'Open Dashboard' -> /portal/admin. Contestant Dashboard shows Entry Fee Payment banner with $50 fee.

contest_management_api.details: POST /api/admin/contests creates contests, GET /api/admin/contests returns list, GET /api/contests/active returns active contest info

payment_management_api.details: GET /api/admin/payments returns payments with totals (entry_fees, vote_packages, total) and counts

entry_fee_payment_api.details: POST /api/payments/entry-fee creates Stripe checkout (returns 500 with test key - expected), GET /api/payments/my-status returns payment status

user_management_api.details: GET /api/contestants with filters (status, search), PUT /api/admin/contestants/{id}/status for approve/reject

category_management_api.details: Full CRUD: POST, GET, PUT, DELETE /api/categories

admin_panel_ui.details: Dashboard, Contests, Payments, Contestants sections all load correctly with proper data

create_contest_modal.details: Modal opens with all fields: name, description, entry_fee ($50 default), max_participants (100 default), prize_pool ($35000 default), status, dates, rules

payments_section_ui.details: Shows 4 stats cards (Total Revenue, Entry Fees, Vote Packages, Total Transactions), filters (All Types, All Status), Transaction History table

contestants_section_ui.details: Shows search input, status filter, contestant table with name, category, votes, status, round, actions

entry_fee_payment_banner.details: Contestant Dashboard shows Entry Fee Payment banner with $50 fee, 'Complete Your Entry' text, 'Pay Entry Fee - $50' button, Stripe security note

bugs_fixed.issue: KeyError: 'id' in get_my_payment_status - was using current_user['id'] instead of current_user['user_id']
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to use current_user.get('user_id') or current_user.get('id')
Added user_id extraction at start of function

mocked_apis.Email OTP: MOCKED - Logs to console instead of sending actual emails via SendGrid
mocked_apis.Stripe Checkout: Stripe API key is placeholder (sk_test_emergent) - returns error when creating checkout session
